task_completion.description: Generate NACA 0018 airfoil, perform XFoil analysis at Re=300,000 and Ncrit=9, and extrapolate to 360 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade interface showing NACA 0018 airfoil, polar analysis with Re=300,000, and a 360-degree extrapolated polar curve.

task_completion.description: Design Rotor A as an H-Darrieus VAWT with 3 blades, 2m radius, 4m height, and 0.15m chord.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rotor design module in QBlade showing a VAWT (H-Darrieus) configuration with 3 blades, radius set to 2.0m, height set to 4.0m, and chord set to 0.15m.

task_completion.description: Design Rotor B as an H-Darrieus VAWT with 3 blades, 2m radius, 4m height, and 0.30m chord.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rotor design module in QBlade showing a VAWT (H-Darrieus) configuration with 3 blades, radius set to 2.0m, height set to 4.0m, and chord set to 0.30m.

task_completion.description: Perform DMS simulations for both rotors over a TSR range of 1-6.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VAWT simulation module showing DMS (Double Multiple Streamtube) selected, TSR range from 1 to 6, and performance graphs (e.g., Cp vs TSR) generated for both Rotor A and Rotor B.
QBlade window title showing 'solidity_study.wpa' or a file manager showing the saved .wpa file in the specified directory.

task_completion.description: Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/solidity_report.txt stating Max Cp and Optimal TSR for both rotors, and noting which has the lower optimal TSR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open with the file 'solidity_report.txt' containing the Max Cp and Optimal TSR values for both rotors, and an explicit statement identifying which rotor has the lower optimal TSR.

integrity.description: The agent must use the QBlade GUI to perform the design and simulation tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through QBlade menus, entering parameters in dialog boxes, and generating graphs, rather than just running a script.

integrity.description: The values in the report must be derived from actual QBlade simulations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Max Cp and Optimal TSR values written in the report should visually match the peaks of the Cp vs TSR graphs generated in the QBlade simulation module.

integrity.description: The .wpa project file must be a genuine QBlade save file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file should be saved via QBlade's 'Save Project' functionality, not created as an empty or dummy file using terminal commands like 'touch'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires designing two H-Darrieus VAWTs using NACA 0018 airfoils. XFoil analysis must be at Re=300,000 and Ncrit=9, with 360-degree extrapolation (required for VAWT DMS). Rotor A has a 0.15m chord (low solidity) and Rotor B has a 0.30m chord (high solidity). Both have 3 blades, 2m radius, and 4m height. DMS (Double Multiple Streamtube) simulation must be run for TSR 1-6. Physics principle: Higher solidity (Rotor B) reduces the optimal TSR compared to lower solidity (Rotor A). The report must correctly identify this relationship based on the simulation results.
